From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1973 studio album by Ivan "Boogaloo Joe" Jones

| Black Whip | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Ivan "Boogaloo Joe" Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") | |
| Released | 1973 |
| Recorded | July 25, 1973 |
| Studio | Broadway Recording Studios, New York City |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 10072 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Ozzie Cadena](/wiki/Ozzie_Cadena "Ozzie Cadena") |
| [Ivan "Boogaloo Joe" Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Snake Rhythm Rock](/wiki/Snake_Rhythm_Rock "Snake Rhythm Rock")* (1972) | ***Black Whip*** (1973) | *[Sweetback](/w/index.php?title=Sweetback_(album)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sweetback (album) (page does not exist)")* (1975) | | |

***Black Whip*** is the eighth album by guitarist [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") which was recorded in 1973 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_Whip&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStar[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 3 stars.[[3]](#cite_note-Allmusic-3)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_Whip&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Ivan "Boogaloo Joe" Jones except where noted.

1. "Black Whip" – 6:45
2. "[My Love](/wiki/My_Love_(Paul_McCartney_%26_Wings_song) "My Love (Paul McCartney & Wings song)")" ([Linda McCartney](/wiki/Linda_McCartney "Linda McCartney"), [Paul McCartney](/wiki/Paul_McCartney "Paul McCartney")) – 5:26
3. "Freak Off" – 8:29
4. "[Daniel](/wiki/Daniel_(Elton_John_song) "Daniel (Elton John song)")" ([Elton John](/wiki/Elton_John "Elton John"), [Bernie Taupin](/wiki/Bernie_Taupin "Bernie Taupin")) – 4:20
5. "Ballad of Mad Dogs and Englishmen" ([Leon Russell](/wiki/Leon_Russell "Leon Russell")) – 6:56
6. "Crank Me Up" – 7:06

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Black_Whip&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Ivan "Boogaloo Joe" Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") – [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* Dave Hubbard – [soprano saxophone](/wiki/Soprano_saxophone "Soprano saxophone"), [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone"), [percussion](/wiki/Percussion "Percussion")
* Bobby Knowles- [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ")
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") – [electric piano](/wiki/Electric_piano "Electric piano")
* [Ron Carter](/wiki/Ron_Carter "Ron Carter") – [bass](/wiki/Double_bass "Double bass"), [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* Bud Kelly – [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit"), percussion
* Jimmy Johnson – percussion
